subcodes.first_line: O Afnan of the blessed Tree! The letter thou didst write to one of the friends was perused [3.5s]... ...consider thou the manner in which Ḥají Mírza Muḥammad-Taqí Afnan, that sanctified spirit and confirmed soul, arose to serve this great Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنان سدره مبارکه نامه ای که بیکی از یاران مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @predictions and prophecies
